name: C2xTestWaitForSignalMatch
title: C2xTestWaitForSignalMatch
syntax: long C2xTestWaitForSignalMatch (char* protocolDesignator, char* tokenDesignator, int64 tokenValue, long timeout) // form 1
long C2xTestWaitForSignalMatch (char* protocolDesignator, char* tokenDesignator, int64 tokenValue, char* stationName, long timeout) // form 2
description: Waits for the occurrence of the first Car2x message with a signal that matches the given value. Should the message not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Protocol designator of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Token designator of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: tokenValue
parameters.description: Token value that should be awaited.

parameters.name: stationName
parameters.description: Name of the sender station of the Car2x message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]. Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
